title: Glenda Residences
tagline: Apartment management and utility billing system with admin webapp and Telegram support bot
bullets: Covers tenant management, meter readings, bill generation, payment tracking, and reminder workflows through a React admin webapp
Uses a Telegram bot as a secondary operational interface with shared billing data and PDF bill generation
Supports PostgreSQL in production with startup migrations and includes SMS reminder delivery for billing operations

title: DripMon
tagline: Community tooling ecosystem built as a Discord bot and a NeoForge mod for the DripTeam server
bullets: Includes a dedicated Discord bot repository for DripMon community interactions and server-side utility flows
Includes a separate NeoForge mod repository built for the DripTeam Minecraft server
Represents a multi-surface community project spanning both chat tooling and in-game mod support

title: Daarkin
tagline: Full-stack job application tracker for managing hiring pipelines across desktop and mobile
bullets: Built to help job seekers create, update, search, and track applications through clear hiring stages
Uses a split React frontend and Express API with PostgreSQL migrations plus JWT-based authentication
Structured as a monorepo with separate web and API apps and a Vercel deployment path for the frontend surface

title: VGC Puzzle Trainer
tagline: Deterministic battle puzzle trainer for competitive VGC players
bullets: Builds web-based VGC puzzles around provable answers like speed checks, KO thresholds, and deterministic field interactions
Plans puzzle generation through simulation, replay imports, and moderated community submissions sharing one database
Separates the app into independently deployable web, API, and pipeline components with room for AI-enriched explanations later

title: SpeakForge
tagline: Language and communication tool focused on iterative learning
bullets: Guides users through structured speaking and review loops
Emphasizes fast feedback and lightweight interaction
Built for maintainability with modular service boundaries
